---
name: agent-authoring
description: >
  Expert guidance for writing, editing, and debugging agent and skill
  frontmatter, CLAUDE.md harness rules, and SKILL.md files.
---

Provides discipline and conventions for authoring agent files
(agents/**/*.md), skill files (skills/**/SKILL.md), and harness
configuration files (CLAUDE.md). Activates when the router handles
harness file edits directly rather than delegating to a sub-agent.
